en_title: Official Street Fighter 6 Fragrances Let You Smell Just Like Juri, Ed, and Ingrid
cn_title: 《街头霸王6》推出朱莉、艾德和英格丽德官方香氛
subtitle: 闻起来像格斗家
opus_summary: 卡普空与Gaming Fragrances合作，为《街头霸王6》的朱莉、艾德和英格丽德推出角色香氛油扩散器，每套售价6,850日元(约合人民币286元)，10月发货。

paragraphs.en: Wanna smell like a fighter (minus all the blood and sweat, that is)? Well then, you’re in luck, because three characters from Street Fighter 6 are getting their own official scents, courtesy of a special collaboration between Capcom and Gaming Fragrances.
paragraphs.cn: 想闻起来像格斗家，却不要鲜血和汗水味？你的运气来了。卡普空与Gaming Fragrances特别合作，为《街头霸王6》三名角色推出官方专属香氛。

paragraphs.en: World Warriors can now smell just like Ed, Ingrid, and Juri thanks to three specially-crafted oil sets officially licensed by Capcom. Each set contains a wood diffuser and a fragrant oil with notes tuned to each character’s unique traits.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空正式授权的三款特制香氛油套装，让「世界格斗家」可以闻起来像艾德、英格丽德和朱莉。每套包含木质扩香器和一瓶香氛油，香调均针对角色的独特特征调制。

paragraphs.en: Ed’s scent profile is a mix of bergamot, vetiver, clove, spearmint, and rosemary, with a “crisp, woody amber” finish. Gaming Fragrances said it’s the perfect scent to “let you throw out counter pokes without getting whiff-punished.”
paragraphs.cn: 艾德香氛混合佛手柑、香根草、丁香、留兰香和迷迭香，并以「清爽的木质琥珀」收尾。Gaming Fragrances称，这种香味最适合「让你打出反击牵制，又不会因挥空遭到惩罚」。

paragraphs.en: Ingrid’s fragrance oil “evokes an unhurried, continuous flow” with grapefruit, leafy green, rose, and jasmine, along with a combination of woody notes, amber, musk, and “lingering” citrus. It’s the perfect scent for Ingrid mains who want to “enhance clarity in stock accumulation and release timing.”
paragraphs.cn: 英格丽德香氛油以葡萄柚、绿叶、玫瑰和茉莉，搭配木质香调、琥珀、麝香和「萦绕不散」的柑橘气息，「唤起从容而连续的流动感」。它适合想要「提升资源积累清晰度和释放时机」的英格丽德主力玩家。

paragraphs.en: No, Juri’s scent doesn’t smell like feet, you freaks: her profile is described as a “fruity floral fragrance” with notes of strawberries, passion fruit, raspberries, blueberries, and violets to “make your hit-confirms feel razor-sharp.”
paragraphs.cn: 不，朱莉的香氛并不是脚味，你们这些怪人。它被形容为「果香花香调」，融合草莓、百香果、覆盆子、蓝莓和紫罗兰，旨在「让你的命中确认如刀锋般精准」。

paragraphs.en: Gaming Fragrances is a Japanese brand owned by Code Meee, which launched the fragrance house in May 2026 with the goal of “incorporating the world of your favorite characters into your daily life through scent.”
paragraphs.cn: Gaming Fragrances是Code Meee旗下日本品牌。这家香氛公司于2026年5月成立，目标是「通过气味，把你喜爱的角色世界融入日常生活」。

paragraphs.en: These oil diffusers aren’t to be used on your body like a perfume or scent mist; instead, gamers should pour 3-4 drops of the oil onto the wood diffusers to give their room a special vibe before diving onto Ranked. Each diffuser retails at ¥6,850 ($42.15 USD) and will ship out in October 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 这些香氛油扩散器不能像香水或香氛喷雾那样用于身体。玩家应在木质扩香器上滴3至4滴香氛油，排位赛开打前先为房间营造特别氛围。每套售价6,850日元(约合人民币286元)，将于2026年10月发货。

paragraphs.en: This isn’t the first time Capcom has evoked the smell of Street Fighter characters; it's done this a fair few times with the brand over the years, notably releasing three character-specific perfumes at the Capcom Cafe in 2024 for Luke, Jamie, and Ed that were "packed with the personalities of each character.”
paragraphs.cn: 这并非卡普空首次呈现《街头霸王》角色的气味。多年来，公司已与该品牌合作过数次，尤其在2024年于卡普空咖啡馆推出卢克、杰米和艾德三款角色专属香水，据称每款都「充满角色个性」。

paragraphs.en: It’s unclear if any more fighters will be getting the Gaming Fragrances treatment moving forward, but there’s some characters you probably wouldn’t want to smell like, anyway (we can't imagine anyone would want to smell like M. Bison who, at this point, probably smells like horse ).
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚未来是否会有更多格斗家获得Gaming Fragrances香氛待遇。不过有些角色大概没人想闻起来像他们，例如维加——他现在可能闻起来像马。
